description: Machine-checkable rules for VNPT React Developer two-layer audit.

rules.description: Component directories should include index.tsx, types.ts, hooks.ts, index.ts, and a test file unless justified.
Component folder names should use kebab-case.
Component directories should expose a barrel export file index.ts.
Avoid explicit any in React source unless strongly justified.
A component package should usually have a types.ts file.
Hooks should use the useXxx naming convention.
Effects that add listeners, intervals, or timeouts should include cleanup.
Review effects with suspicious empty dependency arrays or missing dependency comments.
Component directories should include a test scaffold.
Detect likely inline object/array props that may cause avoidable rerenders.
Avoid creating RegExp instances inside render paths.
Prefer immutable sorting patterns such as toSorted where appropriate.
Direct fetch/axios calls inside component render modules should be reviewed.
Data-heavy components without hooks/adapters should be reviewed for query-layer extraction.
Very large component files may indicate too much responsibility in one module.
